title: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.7 with longer context and faster artifacts
summary: The flagship Anthropic model gets sharper long-document reasoning and a faster artifact generation path, available across claude.ai and the API today.

title: OpenAI rolls out Codex 2 in ChatGPT for autonomous repo-scale coding
summary: The new Codex 2 agent inside ChatGPT can read entire repositories, draft multi-file PRs, and run tests, with safer sandbox limits than the original Codex release.

title: Google brings Gemini 3 Pro to all Workspace customers
summary: Gemini 3 Pro is now the default model behind Docs, Sheets, Gmail and Meet for paid Workspace tiers, with new agentic actions across files.

title: NVIDIA unveils Rubin GPUs aimed at trillion-parameter inference
summary: Rubin doubles memory bandwidth over Blackwell and ships with a new NVLink fabric, with cloud availability across hyperscalers expected by Q3 2026.

title: Meta releases Llama 4 multimodal in 8B, 70B and 405B sizes
summary: Llama 4 lands with native vision and audio understanding, an Apache-style license, and benchmarks that match or beat GPT-4o on common evals.

title: Runway Gen-4 brings character consistency across shots
summary: Runway's latest video model preserves characters, costumes and props across multiple shots, closing a long-standing gap with traditional VFX pipelines.

title: ElevenLabs launches real-time voice agents for customer support
summary: ElevenLabs ships sub-500ms conversational voice agents as a hosted product, with native integrations for Zendesk and Intercom.

title: Hugging Face crosses 2.5M public models, doubling in 18 months
summary: The hub passes a fresh milestone driven by a wave of open vision-language models and on-device fine-tunes built for laptops and phones.

title: Microsoft adds custom-agent builder to Copilot for the enterprise
summary: The new Copilot Studio tier lets IT admins author agents that read internal data via Graph and act on behalf of users with full audit trails.

title: Suno v5 ships stem separation and an exporter for major DAWs
summary: Suno's latest model produces longer songs and lets users download individual stems, opening AI-generated audio to mainstream music production workflows.
